# Publishing Checklist

Before making this repository public, confirm:

- [ ] Repository purpose is clearly documented
- [ ] A primary maintainer, DRI, or owning team is identified
- [ ] `CODEOWNERS` is present and accurate
- [ ] License is correct
- [ ] README has been updated from template text
- [ ] Support expectations are documented
- [ ] Security reporting path is correct
- [ ] Required automation is enabled
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are present
- [ ] Visibility and placement are appropriate
